headline: South Africa Eyes Crypto Tax Under Existing Laws

article.title: South Africa proposes crypto tax rules under existing tax framework
article.summary: South Africa’s tax authority proposed draft guidance clarifying how crypto assets are taxed under existing income and capital gains tax rules, seeking public input until Aug. 31.

headline: Binance Sees $1.2B Outflow Amid ETH Exodus

article.title: Binance outflows triple to $1.2B as ETH withdrawals hit 3-year high
article.summary: Binance recorded $1.23 billion in weekly net outflows, up 207% from the previous week, as Ethereum withdrawals surged to a three-year high.

headline: OPEC+ Boosts Output 500k Barrels Amid Gulf Recovery

article.title: OPEC+ Ratifies Planned Oil Quota Hike as Gulf Flows Rebound
article.summary: Major OPEC+ members agreed another modest increase to their collective oil-production quotas for next month, adding to the prospect of more supply eventually hitting the market if a US-Iran peace pact can stick.
